name: io.github.lindoai/mcp-server
title: Lindo AI
description: Create and manage Lindo AI websites, pages, blogs, clients, and credits from any MCP client.

environmentVariables.name: LINDO_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Lindo AI API key. Create one at https://app.lindo.ai under Workspace Settings → API Keys. Requires a Business or Whitelabel plan.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: OAuth 2.1 Bearer token. Most MCP clients (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, Smithery) obtain this automatically via the server's OAuth flow on first connect — no manual setup required. Format: 'Bearer <token>'.
